docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY LAAN, STENDERT C AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SONG K ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED APR-27-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SONG K

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE - PLAINTIFF STENDERT C. LAAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SONG LEE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAAN, STENDERT C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, SONG K $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SONG K
